title: Zwift Buys Rouvy, Expanding Its Digital Footprint and Potentially Sidestepping the UCI
content:
The acquisition brings real-world video routes into the Zwift ecosystem, streamlining hardware standards and building an event portfolio that poses a potential challenge to the UCI.

Read the full article at Zwift Buys Rouvy, Expanding Its Digital Footprint and Potentially Sidestepping the UCI on Velo.
author: Josh Ross
